summary: Tested GS1 & Licensing Hub - unified page consolidating /gs1, /licensing, /comprehensive-licensing into single /gs1-licensing page. All 6 tabs are clickable and switch content correctly. Legacy routes redirect to unified hub. Navigation bar shows single 'GS1 & Licensing' link under Business dropdown. Frontend implementation is correct. Minor API issues (404s) for some GS1 endpoints.

minor.issue: Returns 404 Not Found - causes 'Failed to load GS1 business info' error in GS1 & Business tab
Returns 404 Not Found - causes 'Failed to load products' error in Products & Barcodes tab

action_items: Backend: Implement /api/gs1/business-info endpoint or verify it exists
Backend: Implement /api/gs1/products endpoint or verify it exists
critical_code_review_comments: GS1LicensingHub.jsx correctly implements unified view with 6 tabs using shadcn Tabs component
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing (tab-overview, tab-gs1-business, tab-products, tab-licensing, tab-compensation, tab-agreements)
Error handling is properly implemented - shows ErrorState when API fails
API calls use getAuthHeaders() for authenticated endpoints
Legacy routes /gs1, /licensing, /comprehensive-licensing correctly configured to render GS1LicensingHub in App.js
NavigationBar correctly shows single 'GS1 & Licensing' link under Business dropdown

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All UI elements work, 2 API endpoints return 404

context_for_next_testing_agent: GS1 & Licensing Hub unified page tested at /gs1-licensing. All 6 tabs work (Overview, GS1 & Business, Products & Barcodes, Platform Licensing, Compensation, Agreements & Compliance). Compensation and Agreements tabs have working sub-tabs. API endpoints /api/gs1/business-info and /api/gs1/products return 404 - this may be intentional if GS1 backend module is not fully implemented.
